name: Salad Bar Diet Delight
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the fish in the center of a dinner plate. Arrange the slower-cooking vegetables around the fish. Scatter the remaining, quicker cooking vegetables over all. Cover everything with plastic wrap.
2. Cook at 100% for 4 minutes.
3. Remove from the oven and uncover. Sprinkle with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Serve hot.
